{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320170839E629A9BEC198020BBE47"}"},"total":9309},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7180157645251330851","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书超赞！！作者文笔精炼，文采斐然。所刻画的人物形象生动活泼、跃然纸上。简直是yyds。书荒的同志快来♡(*´∀｀*)人(*´∀｀*)♡
   本文作者是真的懂，有想法他真的写。尤其是抗战时期那段，绝对又爽又虐。爽的是看主角单刀直入敌营，用敌人的武器干掉他们。虐的是主角更趋向于一个普通人，在班长牺牲时他没有办法去救他。
      最让我感动的不是班长牺牲时，而是主角将班长遗物带给那个老妪时。你想一个年长色衰都可以做奶奶的人，在收到自己曾经心尖上那人的遗物时，没有半分惊讶，只有满脸平静。为何平静？大概是老妪早就知道班长要和她交代的话，在心中模拟了无数遍；作为枕边人她了解他的一切，又怎会不知他所言所想？
      班长临死还在牵挂妹子，而妹子虽年迈也仍唱给班长。两人虽然终身难见，却互相牵挂。最使我意难平。
      希望作者多多加更。提前祝新年快乐","text_exts":[{"e":145,"s":142,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773997719020BBE47%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227180157645251330851%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227174739573791001612%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1671760796,"group_id":"7174739573791001612","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这个很懒，什么都没有留下","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N25JSt2IThfkQ80vsnAmrBt8dr92PSUB94uR78I1Kkhm","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7856f1b92d7948b095b9cec7c39e2404~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776530279&x-signature=6J3v5%2Fa%2BV1ODCtDiKUXGczCx7GI%3D","user_id":"2643696529447021","user_name":"有个仙人"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2643696529447021","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7174739573791001612","book_info":{"abstract":"如果你能穿越改变历史，你会做些什么？
“我想告诉雍正，别选妃啦，同一时期的西边都要工业化了，他努努力，争点气，多搞科学，这个时候，上四休三的就是我们啦！”
“要是能穿越大明朝，绝对不能让朱祁镇上位，这样大明没准就不会衰亡！大明千秋万载！”
“穿到南宋，完颜构滚啊！没了他完颜构，岳武穆，怎么可能保不下汉人江山。”
“三国的话，丞相诶，撤掉马谡啊，咱北伐夺取江山。是高端局。”
“还有大秦朝，我要把世界地图，交给嬴政！大秦绝不应二世而亡！”
“要是能穿越到八十多年前，我想去一趟金陵，把那三十万人，都带走……”
我叫林珏，在电视台工作，因为和领导吵架，被派去网宣组，搞起了深夜直播，没想到，我却觉醒了改变吧！历史系统！于是我一边深夜直播，一边穿越一段段历史……直到历史上，竟然也留下了无数关于我的传说！有人认为我是永生者！我也成了时间刺客！大夏历史里的作弊器！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o0d5b2faeb14437d47c570095b0454ebb~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"馒头豆沙包","author_id":"","book_id":"7174739573791001612","book_name":"弹幕来自未来，全民看我改变历史","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9245人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":504,"name":"抗战谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504&name=抗战谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7174747246171750923","read_count":"9245","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1048796"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.2","serial_count":"476","tags":"抗战谍战,历史,系统,穿越,直播,架空,无脑爽,都市","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/28cc68c0b193fef49db71f85c0cc607d~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779181719&x-signature=kujXA0JWb7GbQGrvM1BIbLvssU8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list
